name: rho-reader
description: LLM-powered reading assistant for the Rho Reader Obsidian plugin

interface.shortDescription: Tag and recommend posts from your Rho Reader vault.
interface.longDescription: A Codex plugin companion for Rho Reader that adds skills for tagging RSS posts, deep-tagging from full article content, and generating personalized recommendations from your vault.
defaultPrompt: Tag my untagged Rho Reader posts.
Deep-tag unread posts from a specific author.
Recommend 5 unread posts about Go concurrency.
